prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 135 名（2026 年），近年排名稳步上升（2021 年第 165→2026 年第 135），学校综合实力持续增强；抖音热度排名第 58（较热），综合热度 55 万，短视频曝光量中等偏上；声誉评价方面 2022 年曾因宿舍改造问题偏负面，近年无明显负面舆情；未见投档断档记录；石河子大学在第五轮学科评估中未进入 A 类评级，但作为综合性大学，在医学（临床医学、口腔医学）、农学（动物医学、植物生产类）、工学（电气、机械、计算机）等领域有较完整学科布局。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等工科专业社会热度持续高热，与该校物理类招生专业高度匹配；本省 2026 年考生总数预计约 120 万（较 2025 年约 90.7 万明显增加），物理类考生按比例估算约 73.4 万，竞争加剧；石河子大学位于新疆，距河南较远，地域偏好对部分考生构成一定阻力；该校在河南招生规模较大（物理类 300+ 人），属于该校在省外的主要生源地之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026 年计划小幅扩招约 3.5%、本省考生总数明显增加、学校排名稳步上升但地域偏远等因素，在 2025 年基准 71205 名基础上预计竞争略有加剧，位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约 73000 名，区间 72500–73500 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 54949→58004→64505→96379→71205. From 2021 to 2023, the ranking shifted backward by about 10,000 positions each year. In 2024, due to Henan's first new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant fluctuation to 96379, and in 2025 it returned to 71205. The fluctuation over the past 5 years has been large, with a baseline of about 71205 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 308 in 2021→304 in 2022→302 in 2023→284 in 2024→346 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 358, a slight expansion of about 3.5% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 135th (2026), with a steady rise in recent years (165th in 2021→135th in 2026), indicating continuously enhanced comprehensive strength. Douyin popularity ranking 58th (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity 550,000, short video exposure moderately high. In terms of reputation evaluation, there was a negative bias in 2022 due to dormitory renovation issues, but no significant negative public opinion in recent years. No records of admission cutoff breaks. Shihezi University did not enter the A-class rating in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, but as a comprehensive university, it has a relatively complete discipline layout in medicine (clinical medicine, stomatology), agriculture (animal medicine, plant production), engineering (electrical, mechanical, computer), etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information remains high, highly matching the university's Physics Category enrollment majors. The total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is expected to be about 1.2 million (significantly increased from about 907,000 in 2025), with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 734,000, intensifying competition. Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Henan, and regional preference poses some resistance for some examinees. The university has a large enrollment scale in Henan (300+ in Physics Category), making it one of the main sources of students outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, a slight enrollment expansion of about 3.5% in 2026, a significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province, the university's steady rise in ranking but remote location, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 71205, with a slight backward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is about 73000, with a range of 72500–73500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 72500–73500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 71000), you can focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 majors such as Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Clinical Medicine. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 73500), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 majors, while also considering less competitive Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category approximately 10158→9721→8929→10012→15889. From 2021 to 2023, rankings gradually moved forward year by year; in 2024, they slightly shifted back to 10012; in 2025, due to Henan's first new college entrance examination reform (from liberal arts/science division to history/physics categories), there was a significant backward shift to 15889. The 2025 baseline is approximately 15889th place; provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans: 2021: 60 students → 2022: 48 students → 2023: 42 students → 2024: 60 students → 2025: 42 students; 2026 plan: 38 students, a reduction of about 9.5% compared to 2025, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; approximately 135th on the Soft Science main ranking (2026), with steadily rising rankings in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking 58th (relatively popular); no significant negative public opinion in recent reputation evaluations; no records of enrollment gaps; Shihezi University did not enter the A-class rating in the fifth round of discipline evaluation; its liberal arts majors mainly include teacher training (Chinese Language and Literature, Education, Preschool Education), Law, Journalism, etc., with average disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Law is a recommended major; teacher training/education is in a wait-and-see differentiation; foreign languages are generally wait-and-see; the estimated number of history category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 466,000 (a significant increase from about 352,000 in 2025), intensifying competition; Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Henan, and geographical preference poses some resistance for certain candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant backward shift in rankings due to the new college entrance examination reform in 2025, the planned enrollment reduction of about 9.5% in 2026, and the notable increase in history category candidates in the province, competition is expected to ease slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 15889th place, with rankings moving forward slightly; predicted minimum ranking approximately 15200th place, range 14700–15700th place.
